commission.notes: 5% on all sales, no tiered structure detected. Unchanged from last audit.

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: Program page states team is available to assist on additional marketing content needs; standard AvantLink creative tools (banners, product feeds, deep links) available to approved affiliates via AvantLink dashboard. No self-serve creative library surfaced publicly.

affiliate_program.approval_requirements: Active website or social media channel with original, high-quality content focused on outdoor recreation or gear; coupon/rebate/deal-aggregation sites not accepted; reviewed case-by-case

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, 600% gear range, ~$3,299)

vs_benchmark.aov: below_median — $550+ stated vs $1,200 median, but entry-level commuter focus explains gap; e-bike AOV ~$3,299 is above median

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). Competitive but not a standout — Trek goes up to 8%, Canyon varies higher.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie remains below the 30-day category median. Bicycles are considered-purchase items (multi-session journey typical). A 30–45 day cookie would materially improve affiliate attribution.
afare_signals.aov_note: $550+ stated AOV for standard bikes. E-bike AOV (Current Plus ~$3,299) yields ~$165 EPC at 5% — nearly 6× the standard bike EPC of ~$27. E-bike content push remains the highest-leverage opportunity.
strengths: Unique low-maintenance belt-drive positioning — clear, repeatable content hook for creators
Same-day shipping + 7-day support = strong conversion story to include in affiliate content
30-day returns reduce buyer hesitation; easy to promote confidently
Costco Next partnership signals mainstream brand credibility
Financing via Affirm broadens accessible buyer pool (higher-priced bikes more attainable)
AvantLink is a reliable, fraud-resistant network with solid tracking
weaknesses: 21-day cookie still below the 30-day category standard — conversion lag risk on considered purchases
5% flat rate — no tiered, performance, or seasonal bonus structure detected
No self-serve creative library; assets require direct outreach to Priority team
Single-network presence (AvantLink only) — no redundancy, limits affiliate discovery via other networks
E-bike high-AOV opportunity not prominently featured or actively pushed in affiliate materials
opportunities: Spring 2026 peak season now live — April/May is highest-demand window for bicycle content
E-bike content push: $3,299 Current Plus at 5% = $165 EPC, highly competitive for cycling affiliates
Hotel/resort travel content angle (Starwood, Nantucket partnerships) for lifestyle and travel creators
Urban commuter and 'car-free lifestyle' / 'bike commuting' content niches growing post-pandemic
Kids bike segment — rust/grease-free belt drive is unique safety/maintenance pitch for parent content creators
threats: Rad Power Bikes, Aventon, and Lectric competitive on e-bike affiliate programs with similar or higher rates
Costco Next listing may siphon price-sensitive buyers who price-compare before converting via affiliate link
Program stagnation risk — no rate improvements or cookie extensions observed across multiple audit cycles

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No changes detected. Commission (5%), cookie (21 days), network (AvantLink only), AOV ($550+), and program terms all unchanged from 2026-04-13 audit. Program has been stable with no modifications observed since at least mid-2024.
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: high — no rate changes, network additions, or structural modifications in 18+ months of available data

recommended_actions: Spring season alert: April 15 is peak window — flag to LiveChannel vendors that affiliate content should be active NOW for spring buyers
Push e-bike affiliate angle: Current Plus at ~$3,299 yields $165 EPC — highest per-click value in Priority catalog
Advocate for cookie extension to 30 days — 2-audit trend confirms stagnation; worth raising with Priority affiliate contact
Monitor for any spring 2026 promotions or new model launches that could be affiliate-activatable
No benchmark updates warranted — bicycles_dtc category data current and accurate as of this audit
